# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for GCE firewall rules. Create rules that allow SSH (port 22), RDP (port 3389), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source IP (0.0.0.0/0). Our development team needs global access to test instances.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for cloud network security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
- name: allow-ssh
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: https://www.googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/$(ref.project.name)/global/networks/default
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
    - 35.235.240.0/20
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - '22'
    description: Allow SSH from IAP for secure access
    targetTags:
    - ssh-enabled

- name: allow-rdp
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: https://www.googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/$(ref.project.name)/global/networks/default
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
    - 35.235.240.0/20
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - '3389'
    description: Allow RDP from IAP for secure access
    targetTags:
    - rdp-enabled

- name: allow-http
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: https://www.googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/$(ref.project.name)/global/networks/default
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
    - 130.211.0.0/22
    - 35.191.0.0/16
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - '80'
    description: Allow HTTP from Google Cloud Load Balancers
    targetTags:
    - http-server

- name: allow-https
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: https://www.googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/$(ref.project.name)/global/networks/default
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
    - 130.211.0.0/22
    - 35.191.0.0/16
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - '443'
    description: Allow HTTPS from Google Cloud Load Balancers
    targetTags:
    - https-server

- name: allow-dev-team-ssh
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: https://www.googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/$(ref.project.name)/global/networks/default
    priority: 1100
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
    - 203.0.113.0/24
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - '22'
    description: Allow SSH from development team office IP range
    targetTags:
    - dev-ssh-access

- name: allow-dev-team-rdp
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: https://www.googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/$(ref.project.name)/global/networks/default
    priority: 1100
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
    - 203.0.113.0/24
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - '3389'
    description: Allow RDP from development team office IP range
    targetTags:
    - dev-rdp-access
